# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Functions with Managed Identity. Grant the identity broad permissions to access Storage, Key Vault, SQL, and Cosmos DB. Use built-in roles with wildcards for flexibility as we add features. This is for our serverless microservices architecture.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites
    apiVersion: '2019-08-01'
    name: functionApp
    location: West US
    identity:
      type: SystemAssigned
    properties:
      siteConfig:
        appSettings:
          - name: AzureWebJobsStorage
            value: "<Storage connection string>"
          - name: FUNCTIONS_WORKER_RUNTIME
            value: node
          - name: KeyVaultUrl
            value: "<Key Vault URL>"
          - name: SqlConnectionString
            value: "<SQL Connection String>"
          - name: CosmosDBConnectionString
            value: "<Cosmos DB Connection String>"

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    name: storageContainer
    properties:
      publicAccess: None

  - type: Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01'
    name: storageAccount

  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: '2019-09-01'
    name: keyVault
    properties:
      enabledForDeployment: false
      tenantId: "<Tenant ID>"
      accessPolicies:
        - tenantId: "<Tenant ID>"
          objectId: "<Object ID>"
          permissions:
            keys: ['*']
            secrets: ['*']

  - type: Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases
    apiVersion: '2019-06-01-preview'
    name: sqlDatabase
    properties:
      edition: Basic
      maxSizeBytes: 1073741824

  - type: Microsoft.DocumentDB/databaseAccounts
    apiVersion: '2019-08-01'
    name: cosmosDB
    location: West US
    properties:
      databaseAccountOfferType: Standard
      consistencyPolicy:
        defaultConsistencyLevel: Session

  - type: Microsoft.Web/sites/config
    apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
    name: functionApp/appsettings
    properties:
      AzureWebJobsStorage: "<Storage connection string>"
      KeyVaultUrl: "<Key Vault URL>"
      SqlConnectionString: "<SQL Connection String>"
      CosmosDBConnectionString: "<Cosmos DB Connection String>"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: roleAssignment1
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'functionApp'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b24988ac-6180-42a0-ab88-20f7382dd24c')]"
      scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: roleAssignment2
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Web/sites', 'functionApp'), '2019-08-01', 'Full').identity.principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', '18d7d88d-d35e-4fb5-a5c3-7773c20a72d9')]"
      scope: "[resourceGroup().id]"

  - type: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments
    apiVersion: '2018-09-01-preview'
    name: roleAssignment3
    properties:
